steps.title: Use the initial count
steps.content:
At $t=0$, the bacteria count is $15{,}000$. Substitute this into $P=C(2)^{rt}$.
$$15{,}000=C(2)^{r(0)}$$
$$15{,}000=C$$

steps.title: Match the exponents
steps.content:
Since $2=2^1$, the exponents must match.
$$1=6r$$
$$r=\frac{1}{6}$$
The answer is B.
